response.overview: Sorrel's Six is a stylish Minecraft heist comedy set on the ASMP server. Soaral, a compulsive gambler, is being assessed for release from “Gamba” rehab. His response: an audacious plan to rob Wawa’s central vault, where all server profits converge.  He recruits six specialists: veteran Mishkasaur, financial cover Warden, demolitions expert Beefy, twitchy redstone engineer Schlemden, and rookie lookout Fomo. The vault door won’t open from inside, their explosive tunnel will collapse behind them, and the timetable is brutal. After a tense break-in, they’re trapped until Soaral reveals hidden insider Cubic, who lets them out. Caught and interrogated by Wawa, they are released when no theft is discovered.  The twist: they never stole a thing. They funnelled Wawa’s goods through its own system and bought them back with clean receipts, leaving Wawa as the unwitting seller of its own loot. The crew revels in their legitimate wealth, and a final joke admits the “Six” were always seven.
response.title: Soaral's Six
